privileged_info_summary: The Flight Crew View app (package: com.robert.fcView) is a real, officially available Android application on Google Play Store designed for pilots and flight attendants to manage flight schedules and collaborate via in-app messaging. The app features a Friends page for schedule sharing and coordination. The expected file paths (/sdcard/large_text_test.png and /sdcard/readability_result.txt) are standard Android storage locations used in the task. The task environment runs the app on an Android emulator with pre-configured login credentials.
